name: What happens if workers comp denies my forklift accident claim?
description: Appeal in 1 yr with lawyer; gather more proof like video, medical experts to overturn.

mainEntity.name: What happens if workers comp denies my forklift accident claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal in 1 yr with lawyer; gather more proof like video, medical experts to overturn.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal within 1 year via state board hearing; many denials overturned with better evidence.** Common reasons: late notice, not work-related.[6] Key factors: Pre-existing conditions or 'idiopathic' defenses countered by medical experts; forklift negligence proven via video/OSHA.[1][2] Request file review first. Attorney handles appeals successfully, securing benefits.
